title: MTTR Calculator
description:
Each line is `incident_id,start_unix,end_unix`. Calculate Mean Time To Recovery in minutes (avg duration across all incidents), rounded to 2 decimal places.

Return `0.00` for empty input.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: 3 incidents, MTTR 10 min
